Metadata.homeDescription: Senior Frontend Engineer Nima Moradirad builds secure, high-performance products across web, Android, and PWA surfaces with scalable architecture and creative product thinking.
Metadata.homeOgDescription: A product engineering portfolio spanning scalable web, Android, PWA, real-time systems, and creative technology.
Metadata.xoDescription: A product case study for XO Arena: a type-safe real-time Tic-Tac-Toe platform with Socket.IO matchmaking, secure sessions, server-validated turns, profiles, and installable PWA support.
Metadata.xoOgDescription: A recorded product walkthrough and engineering case study for a modular, real-time multiplayer platform.
Metadata.manifestDescription: A product engineering portfolio spanning scalable web, Android, PWA, real-time systems, and creative technology.
